Current Openings

    Reference Librarian (Vacancy#: VAR003224) This position is located in the Researcher Engagement & General Collection Division, General & International Collections Directorate, and Researcher & Collections Services Service Unit.The position description number for this position is 447805.The salary range indicated reflects the locality pay adjustments for the Washington, D.C., Metropolitan area.The incumbent of this position will work a flexitime work schedule.This is a non-supervisory, bargaining unit position.Relocation expenses will…
    • Opening Date: February 23, 2026
    • Closing Date: March 9, 2026
    • Grade Level: GS-09
    • Series: 1410
  • temporary ( u.s. citizens only )
    2026 AFC Folklife Internship (Vacancy#:2026 AFC Folklife Interns) This program offers participants insights into the environment and activities of the American Folklife Center, which pairs robust cultural programming with the world's largest ethnographic archive. Interns will be exposed to a broad spectrum of public programs and archives work: artist liaison, production, preservation, reference, access standards, and information management. Depending on the specific project they are assigned, interns will assist staff with coordinating…
    • Opening Date: February 9, 2026
    • Closing Date: March 9, 2026
    • Grade Level: GS-03
    • Series: 0303
  • permanent ( library employees only )
    Supervisory Librarian (Research Specialist) (Vacancy#:VAR003279) The Congressional Research Service (CRS) seeks a Supervisory Librarian to serve as Supervisory Librarian (Research Specialist) of the Research and Library Services (RLS) Section within the Domestic Social Policy (DSP) division. The Section works closely with analysts in DSP, the CRS division that responds to requests for public policy analysis on issues related to education, labor, children and families, poverty, income security, retirement, healthcare,…
    • Opening Date: February 11, 2026
    • Closing Date: March 10, 2026
    • Grade Level: GS-15
    • Series: 1410
  • detail ( library employees only )
    Administrative Specialist (Detail /Temporary Promotion) The Manuscript Division is offering an opportunity for a qualified individual at the GS-08 level to serve on a full-time, 120-day temporary promotion to the GS-09 OR a qualified individual at the GS-09 level (no promotion) to serve on a full-time 120-day detail as the Administrative Specialist in the Manuscript Division. Applicants must have one year time-in-grade at the GS-08 level to qualify for…
    • Opening Date: March 4, 2026
    • Closing Date: March 10, 2026
    • Grade Level: GS-09
    • Series: 0301
  • permanent ( open to all )
    Foreign Law Specialist (Brazil) (Vacancy#:VAR003244) This position is located in the Foreign, Comparative and International Law Division II, Global Legal Research Directorate, Law Library.The Foreign Law Specialist position is located in the Global Legal Research Directorate in the Law Library.     • Opening Date: February 12, 2026

    • Series: 0095
  • permanent ( library employees only )
    Contract Specialist (Vacancy#: VAR003251) This position serves as a Contract Specialist within the Office of the Chief Operating Officer, Library of Congress, Washington, D. C. The incumbent plans, solicits, awards and administers contracts for a number of Service Units within the Library.

  • permanent ( library employees within library collections and services group (lcsg) only )
    Writer-Editor (Vacancy#: VAR003246) This position is in the Communications and Outreach Section, Office of the Director of the National Library Service for the Blind and Print Disabled. The incumbent conceives, plans, researches, writes, complies, edits, and proofreads publications and informational materials for blind and physically handicapped users of the Library of Congress free reading program, a national network of cooperating libraries, consumer groups, and the public.Consideration under…
    • Opening Date: March 2, 2026
    • Closing Date: March 13, 2026
    • Grade Level: GS-12
    • Series: 1082
  • permanent ( library employees within the chief operating officer only )
    Facility Operations Specialist (Vacancy# VAR003268) This position located in the Facility Operations Office, Facility Services, Integrated Support Services (ISS), Library of Congress (LC). The incumbent supports the management of facilities and equipment within the Library of Congress, focusing on Library facilities to include physical structures, utilities, surrounding grounds, custodial and food services. This position performs a variety of administrative services to inspect, maintain, repair/modify facilities, and to operate facility…
    • Opening Date: February 27, 2026
    • Closing Date: March 13, 2026
    • Grade Level: GS-07
    • Series: 1640
  • permanent ( open to all )
    Secretary (Vacancy#:VAR003273) This position is in the Health Services Division (HSD) within the Integrated Support Services Directorate (ISS). The Health Services Division is responsible for the occupational health and wellness program and workers compensation program for Library employees and emergency medical response for employees and visitors to the Library. The Secretary is responsible for providing exemplary customer service in the form of greeting and registering employees…
    • Opening Date: March 2, 2026
    • Closing Date: March 16, 2026
    • Grade Level: GS-06
    • Series: 0318
  • permanent ( open to all )
    Supervisory Digital Projects Specialist (Section Head Digitization Services Section) (Vacancy#:VAR003258) The position serves as the Supervisory Coordinator for Digital Projects located in the Digitization Services Section, Digital Collections Management and Services Division, Digital Services Directorate, Library Services within the Library Collection Services Group at the Library of Congress and reports to the Manager, Digitization Services. The incumbent supervises a core group of digital conversion specialists and technicians, and further coordinates through and at the…
    • Opening Date: March 2, 2026
    • Closing Date: March 16, 2026
    • Grade Level: GS-14
    • Series: 0301
  • permanent ( open to all )
    Project Manager (Vacancy# VAR003280) The position serves as a Project Manager in the Collections Division in the National Library Service for the Blind and Print Disabled (NLS) within the Library of Congress. The position reports directly to the Chief of the Collection Division and performs project management duties related to the planning, development, and delivery of Collection Division strategic goals, initiatives, and special projects.

    Inventory Management Specialist (Vacancy#:VAR003243) This position serves as the Inventory Management Specialist within the Logistics and Facility Management Section (LOG), Business Operations Division (BOD), National Library Service for the Blind and Print Disabled (NLS), Library Collections and Services Group (LCSG). The incumbent assists in preparing and maintaining the official records of the section related to ordering, shipping, receiving, storage, and inventory control.   • permanent ( open to all )
    Equipment Specialist (Electronic) (Vacancy#:VAR003242) Directs a national repair program to maintain playback devices used in the NLS network, including volunteers, regional repair facilities, etc. Analyzes data from network agencies to identify areas with device repair problems and makes recommendations to the Program Delivery Division on matters involving playback device production and reliability.Interprets NLS and quality assurance standards for network of repair agencies.     • Opening Date: March 6, 2026
    • Closing Date: April 7, 2026

    • Series: 1670

The person selected for this position will be placed on the position description that corresponds with their qualifications.     • Opening Date: March 3, 2026
    • Closing Date: April 20, 2026
    • Grade Level: GS-13
    • Series: 0854
  • temporary ( open to all )
    Work Study Student Program 2025/2026 The Library of Congress Work Study Student Program is a progressive, career development program for local high school students. It combines on-the-job training and career development with classroom instructions and education. Under the program, students earn a federal salary, receive work site supervision and career assistance. Students will get the chance to work part-time when school is in session with the possibility of full-time…
    • Opening Date: July 3, 2025
    • Closing Date: April 24, 2026
    • Grade Level: GS-01
    • Series: 0303
  • permanent ( open to all )
    SPP- Register 2026, Selective Placement Program (Noncompetitive Appointments for Applicants with Disabilities) The Library of Congress is accepting applications from people who wish to be considered for employment at the Library under its Selective Placement Program (SPP). It is the policy of the Library to recruit and hire qualified applicants with targeted disabilities by assisting these individuals in obtaining employment consistent with their level of skills and abilities and their capacity for safe and efficient job…
    • Opening Date: November 25, 2025

  • permanent ( library employees only )
    Procurement Technician (Vacancy#:VAR003188) The position is located in the Office of Contracts and Grants Management (OCGM) within the Office of the Chief Operating Officer (COO) at the Library of Congress.
